name: im-not-ai-codex
description: Codex plugin for humanizing Korean AI-written text with Fast default mode and explicit strict subagent workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Remove Korean AI tells while preserving meaning.
interface.longDescription: Humanize KR for Codex provides the humanize-korean skill. Normal use runs a single-call Fast path; strict precision is available only when the user explicitly requests a Codex subagent workflow.
defaultPrompt: $humanize-korean strict 정밀 검증으로 이 글 윤문해줘:
